rationale: The formal EU accession process launch for Ukraine and Moldova is a qualitative new geopolitical development directly relevant to Poland's eastern neighborhood and long-term security architecture.

top_events.title: EU agrees launch of accession process for Ukraine and Moldova
top_events.summary: A formal step toward EU membership for Ukraine and Moldova reshapes Poland's eastern neighborhood long-term, with strategic, economic, and migration implications for Poland as a key advocate of this process.

top_events.title: Putin admits Ukraine attacks hitting Russian economy and society
top_events.summary: Putin's public acknowledgment of economic and social strain from the war is a new qualitative signal relevant to Poland's threat assessment — suggesting Russian capacity may be eroding, though no battlefield change yet.

top_events.title: Iran deal signals: Hormuz reopening and UAE unfreezing Iranian funds
top_events.summary: Progress toward an Iran deal could ease global energy prices indirectly benefiting Polish consumers, though no final agreement is confirmed and timeline remains unclear.
